ground_truth.title: Multichain DeFi Fraud Detection Using Machine Learning on On-Chain Data
ground_truth.abstract: We extract behavioral features from Ethereum, BSC, and Polygon transactions across 23 DeFi protocols to train XGBoost and neural network classifiers for detecting rug pulls and wash trading.
